work_unit: 瞭望轮#39 — audit-cycle fix-in-progress 持续 blocked on human merge
situation: audit-cycle-state.status=fix-in-progress; 9/9 derived_fixes behind=0 merge-ready (case-494~502,519); pending_count=9 不变; scout-scan 显示 10 待合并 worktree; 连续 30+ 轮无源码改动,引擎完全 BLOCKED on human merge/reject 动作。
action: 跑 scout-scan 拿健康快照确认状态未变; 无新工作单位可派生 (所有 finding 已 fix 完毕等待人工); 写本瞭望 case 存档保持节奏; 在 NEXT_SUGGESTION 强烈提醒用户审 diff + merge/reject。
outcome_evidence: scout-scan 输出 '待处理 worktree: 共10, 待合并=10'; audit-cycle-state.json pending_count=9 与上轮一致; 无新增 error/warning; 0 文件改动符合瞭望轮纪律。
next_suggestion: **BLOCKED**: 9 条 derived_fixes (case-494~502,519) 全部 behind=0 merge-ready, 等待用户审 diff 后 merge 或 reject
建议命令: `bash scripts/opt-worktree.sh list` 查看 10 个待合并 worktree, 逐个 `bash scripts/opt-worktree.sh merge <wt>` 或 `reject <wt>`
pending_count 归零后 audit-cycle-state.status 自动切 cycle-complete, 下轮触发新一轮全量审计 (可能挑未审过的子模块如 skills/planning/hooks 之外的区域)
